events.event_description: U.S. Embassy in Uganda established; first Chargé d'Affaires ad interim presented credentials upon Ugandan independence.

evidence.quote: Olcott Hawthorne Deming, Chargé d'Affaires ad interim. Credentials presented: 1962-11-09.

events.event_description: All U.S. diplomatic personnel withdrawn from Uganda; diplomatic representation ended.

evidence.quote: Robert Vossler Keeley, Chargé d'Affaires ad interim. All U.S. diplomatic personnel were withdrawn from Uganda on 1973-11-10.

events.event_description: U.S. Embassy in Uganda re-established after the 1973 withdrawal; Chargé d'Affaires ad interim presented credentials.

evidence.quote: David Crane Halsted, Chargé d'Affaires ad interim. Credentials presented: 1979-06-18.
